official_notes: No recovered historical Claude-vs-official target baseline; used only for old-pipe vs new-pipe Codex comparison.

metadata.label: extra/CapitalOne-AI
metadata.title: Manager, Data Analysis - Card Services
metadata.team_direction: Capital One is a Fortune 200 company and a leader in data-driven decision-making

official_notes: No recovered historical Claude-vs-official target baseline; used only for old-pipe vs new-pipe Codex comparison.

findings.field: Professional Summary; TikTok / DiDi Experience bullets
findings.issue: Modifier phrases such as `team-maintained`, `existing`, `internal`, and `team-owned` are bolded inside bullets, which violates the rule that bolding should stay on technologies and scale signals.
findings.fix: Keep bolding for technologies and quant signals only; remove bold from descriptive modifiers and ownership qualifiers.

findings.issue: The opening framing starts with `Data Analysis Candidate`, which reads as a self-description instead of an immediate role/field anchor on first scan.
findings.fix: Rewrite the first sentence to start with a direct role anchor such as `Data analyst` or `Data/Platform analyst`, then keep the `3+ years / Python / SQL / Spark / ETL` signal.

findings.issue: The resume does not explicitly bridge security and consumer-ops analytics work to card-services-style transactional, reconciliation, or risk analytics, so the target domain still feels like a leap on first read.
findings.fix: Add one bridge sentence in the Summary or topmost relevant experience that connects your work to high-volume operational analytics, reconciliation, partner support, or decision support in a card-services context.

findings.issue: The latest experience is dominated by percentage improvements without a concrete scale anchor such as cases/day, analysts supported, dataset size, QPS, SLA, or team size.
findings.fix: Add one Tier 1 scope metric or a clearer ownership boundary to the first bullet, such as daily case volume, analyst count, dataset size, or service traffic.

revision_priority: [SHOULD] Reframe the Summary opening so it leads with a direct data-analysis role anchor instead of `Data Analysis Candidate`.
[SHOULD] Add one sentence that bridges prior security/consumer operations analytics work to card-services-style transactional or reconciliation analytics.
[SHOULD] Add a concrete Tier 1 scale anchor to the latest TikTok experience so the opening section reads as scope-heavy, not only percent-heavy.
[NICE] Remove bold formatting from descriptive modifiers like `team-maintained`, `existing`, and `internal`.
